name: Creamy Tarragon Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender at low speed or in a food processor with the knife blade attached, blend the first eight ingredients until smooth. Pour the mixture into a small bowl and cover. Refrigerate.
2. To serve, line a large serving dish with a deep dish or foil. Arrange the vegetables and the bowl of dip in the serving dish. If the dip becomes too thick after refrigeration, stir in a little milk until it reaches a dripping consistency.
